page-sites-migrated-523: app/subscribe/page.tsx — migrated to getSession() in #523 (renders PublicPlanPicker for anon; no redirect)
api-routes-exempt: app/api/admin/consulting/[id]/route.ts — platform-admin endpoint, no farm context; session needed for email lookup
app/api/admin/evict-farm-client/route.ts — needs full session.user.farms for arbitrary-slug ADMIN check
app/api/einstein/ask/route.ts — RAG endpoint, bypasses proxy middleware
app/api/einstein/feedback/route.ts — streamed endpoint, bypasses proxy middleware
app/api/farms/[slug]/select/route.ts — proxy shortcircuits this path before auth hoist
app/api/subscription/status/route.ts — cross-farm endpoint needs full session.user.farms list
component-exempt: components/AppShell.tsx — server component shell, session used only to hydrate SessionProvider
lib-helpers-exempt: lib/server/farm-context-errors.ts — error-classifier for getFarmContextForSlug (single dedicated module)
lib/server/farm-context-slug.ts (2 occurrences) — legacy fast-path fallback via getServerSession
_comment.note: lib/auth.ts is ALWAYS exempt (the canonical wrapper itself) and is skipped before auditSource runs — no baseline entry needed. All 11 SSR page-sites migrated to requireSession()/requireFarmAdmin() guards in #523. API/lib entries are intentionally exempt and must be explicitly documented here when added.
